name: Pursuit of Human Benefit and Happiness
definition: To ensure AI technologies are human-centric and respect fundamental rights.
verbatim: AI systems must respect human-centred values and enhance quality of life. Systems must promote happiness while allowing human intervention to preserve autonomy. AI should prioritise the well-being of humans and support societal progress. Developers and deployers must leverage AI to enhance human well-being while respecting individual rights. Human decision-making authority must be maintained; AI must not supplant meaningful human oversight. Technology must serve humanity's broader interests, not cause harm or enable misuse.
keyElements: Respect for human-centred values and fundamental rights
Enhancement of quality of life and well-being
Human intervention preserved to maintain autonomy
Prevention of harm or misuse of AI technology

stakeholderObligations.developers: Design AI to enhance well-being, maintain human oversight, prevent misuse
stakeholderObligations.endUsers: Maintain awareness of AI impact on personal well-being
stakeholderObligations.policymakers: Ensure AI policies prioritise human benefit and societal progress

internationalAlignment: UNESCO AI Ethics — Human dignity and rights
OECD Principle 1.2 — Inclusive growth and well-being
